hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *[Cc]ontroller*|*/routes/*|*/api/*|*/handlers/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[doc-guard] API code edited — update the OpenAPI/API spec in the same change. The generated API doc is the source of truth for endpoints; the README must NOT list them."}}';; *compose*.yaml|*compose*.yml|*/docker/*|*Dockerfile*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[doc-guard] Infrastructure file edited — check README.md and any deployment docs."}}';; */src/*|*/app/*|*/components/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[doc-guard] App source edited — check the relevant README/CLAUDE.md if behaviour changed."}}';; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
